method.district_shortfall_definition: expected P3 broad wins at the circuit's district-court P1 baseline minus actual P3 broad wins
method.mtd_survival_definition: share of P3 district-court MTD cases that are not coded DEFENDANT_WIN
method.judge_name_canonicalization_policy: Singleton surnames and OCR-fragment strings are counted as identified judges only when they can be confidently canonicalized to a fuller identity; otherwise they remain unresolved.
method.share_of_full_shortfall_caveat: District/judge shares of full-circuit shortfall are non-additive diagnostic ratios and may exceed 1.0 because the numerator is a district/judge shortfall while the denominator is the full-circuit shortfall, which also reflects non-district and offsetting components.
appointment_lookup_sources: manual high-impact seeds and OCR corrections
cached prior lookups that already record an office-relevant selection basis
method.appointment_lookup_rule: Use an office-relevant appointment date when a single federal office can be tied to the judge's case district; otherwise leave the lookup unresolved.
method.appointment_lookup_reproducibility_note: Appointment lookup uses manual seeds first, then prior district-keyed lookup entries cached from results/circuit_district_deep_dive_results.json when present, and only then live Wikipedia lookups as needed.
